No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ASGHAR TAHERI's Motion For Protective Order Limiting Business Records Subpoenas is OFF CALENDAR. STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED.Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Spoliation Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jamin P. Horn, Esq. of Methven & Associates, Tel. 510.649.4019, for defendant and moving party;
Scott Jackson, Esq. of Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley LLP, Tel. 510.451.3300, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT ESREF TEKER's Motion For Spoliation Sanctions is denied, without prejudice to seek evidentiary sanctions at trial. One (1) order signed for both motions. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Paoli; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Discovery
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Scott Jackson, Esq. of Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley LLP, Tel. 510.451.3300, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jamin P. Horn, Esq. of Methven & Associates, Tel. 510.649.4019, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASGHAR TAHERI's motion to compel further responses to demand for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff shall provide within 30 days further responses identifying all responsive documents and produce such documents. If Plaintiff does not possess responsive documents, plaintiff shall state whether such documents were ever in plaintiff's possession, and if so, what happened to them. To the extent plaintiff raises privacy objections or claims a privilege, plaintiff shall produce a privilege log identifying generally each document and the basis for the objection or claim. One (1) order signed for both motions. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Paoli; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
